description: The AvatarAnchorLocomotionRelease Component is used so a user can get out of an anchor with their controller when they get into an anchor.

fields.ReleaseOnBinaryAction: Whether to allow the user to jump out of the anchor
fields.ReleaseStrengthThreshold: The amount of pressing strength on the jump button needed to get out if not null.

usage: Has to be used on the same slot as an AvatarAnchor or it doesn't do anything.
